title: Nairobi、Nairobi — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Nairobi、Nairobi的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Nairobi是Nairobi的一個城市，人口約5,340,000。Kenya’s capital and largest city, known as the ‘Green City in the Sun’, a major financial and tech hub in East Africa.
